narrative: Title commitment clean — Schedule B-II shows standard utility easement and recorded CC&Rs. ALTA survey completed, no encroachments. Phase I ESA — no RECs identified, no CRECs or HRECs. Structural inspection — roof installed 2022 with 25-year warranty, foundation no settlement. Zoning compliant for current office use (C-2). Certificate of Occupancy current, matches actual use. Rent roll reconciled to lease abstracts.
